title: Ethereal Dreams
description: An abstract journey through color and emotion, capturing the essence of modern expressionism.

title: Urban Solitude
description: A striking piece that reflects the quiet beauty found in city life and architectural geometry.

title: Golden Horizon
description: Warm tones blend seamlessly in this landscape-inspired artwork that evokes sunset serenity.

title: Midnight Whispers
description: Deep blues and silvers dance across canvas in this contemplative nocturnal composition.

title: Resonance
description: Vibrant geometric forms create a sense of rhythm and harmony in this contemporary masterpiece.

title: Verdant Serenity
description: Lush greens and organic shapes celebrate the tranquility and beauty of the natural world.

title: Fragments of Time
description: Layered textures and muted tones explore memory and the passage of time.

title: Neon Nights
description: Electric cityscapes captured in vivid neon hues against the darkness of the urban night.

title: The Last Petal
description: A delicate still life that captures the fleeting beauty of a single bloom in exquisite detail.

title: Cosmic Drift
description: Swirling galaxies and celestial forms merge in this otherworldly abstract composition.

title: Rust & Bone
description: Industrial textures and earthy tones combine in this raw, evocative mixed-media work.

title: Tranquil Waters
description: Soft reflections on calm waters evoke a deep sense of peace and meditative stillness.
